calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2007 Continued To Sep-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-24-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: P. Van Steenberge.
Dennis Soto, Esq. for Plaintiff: Young Electric Company, Inc.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Retail Planning & Construction, Inc. as follows:
Prejudgment Interest $3,824.31
Attorney's Fees $9,880.00
Costs $783.50, for a total of $14,487.81
Judgment signed in open court.
